text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer's here, and it's bringing the heat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to gear up for the Sprinters Stakes, Taiki
Shuttle is prepared to take on any training
necessary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her determination at an all-time high, the
two of us start summer camp!
